source: Kaggle T4 run; transcribed from full log. Command: train_trajectory --task distance --constrained_velocity --epochs 6 --seed 0 (6-module grid cortex).
cortex: velocity-driven hexagonal grid modules (6 modules, constrained_velocity)
note: 6-module grid cortex. WITHIN-1 (magnitude within one bucket) is the stable, meaningful metric: 94/91/89 ON vs 87/74/71 OFF, FLAT across length and BEATS the place cortex's 94/78/81 (which degrades). cortex rep excellent (probe 100/95/93). EXACT-bucket is training-UNSTABLE (peaked 74% at epoch 1, oscillated to 44% by epoch 6) — the LLM's 6-class boundary decisions wobble across epochs; final snapshot undersells it. Fix: early stopping / lower LR.
